title.en: Rodri to have back surgery but Maresca brushes off transfer speculation
title.zh-CN: 罗德里（ Rodri ）将接受背部手术，但马雷斯卡（ Maresca ）掩盖了转移

summary.en: World Cup winner Rodri is to have back surgery, says new Manchester City boss Enzo Maresca.
summary.zh-CN: 曼城新任主帅恩佐·马雷斯卡（ Enzo Maresca ）表示，世界杯冠军罗德里（ Rodri ）将接受背部手术。

title.en: Klopp starts Germany reign by threatening to quit
title.zh-CN: 克洛普通过威胁退出开始德国统治

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp starts his reign as Germany's head coach by threatening to quit if the media invades his family's privacy.
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）开始担任德国主教练，威胁说如果媒体侵犯他家人的隐私，他就会辞职。

title.en: Messiah or papering over cracks? Klopp must sway doubters in Germany rebuild
title.zh-CN: 弥赛亚还是在裂缝上涂纸？克洛普必须动摇德国重建的怀疑者

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp is a legend at his former clubs, but he will need to convince his critics if he is to succeed in his toughest managerial challenge yet.
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）是他前俱乐部的传奇人物，但如果他想在迄今为止最艰难的管理挑战中取得成功，他需要说服批评者。

title.en: Chelsea agree deal to sign Palace defender Lacroix
title.zh-CN: 切尔西同意签下宫殿后卫拉克鲁瓦

summary.en: Chelsea agree deal to sign France defender Maxence Lacroix from Crystal Palace after two impressive seasons.
summary.zh-CN: 切尔西同意在两个令人印象深刻的赛季后从水晶宫签下法国后卫马克森斯·拉克鲁瓦。

title.en: Kane set for talks with Bayern Munich over new deal
title.zh-CN: 凯恩将与拜仁慕尼黑就新协议进行谈判

summary.en: Harry Kane is set to begin talks over a new Bayern Munich contract, with Barcelona and various Saudi Arabian clubs reportedly interested in the England captain.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）将开始就一份新的拜仁慕尼黑合同进行谈判，据报道，巴塞罗那和各家沙特阿拉伯俱乐部都对这位英格兰队队长感兴趣。

title.en: Van Bommel appointed Belgium head coach
title.zh-CN: 范博梅尔被任命为比利时主教练

summary.en: Belgium appoint former Netherlands captain Mark van Bommel as their new head coach on a contract running through Euro 2028.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时任命前荷兰队长马克·范博梅尔（ Mark van Bommel ）为新任主教练，合同有效期至2028年欧洲杯。

title.en: Australia star allegedly tests positive for cocaine after speeding
title.zh-CN: 据称澳大利亚明星超速驾驶后可卡因检测呈阳性

summary.en: Socceroos World Cup star Cristian Volpato allegedly tests positive for cocaine after being twice caught for speeding in Sydney.
summary.zh-CN: 据称， Socceroos世界杯明星克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托（ Cristian Volpato ）在悉尼两次因超速行驶而被捕后，可卡因检测呈阳性

title.en: England amputee team's World Cup dream on hold
title.zh-CN: 英格兰截肢者队的世界杯梦想暂停

summary.en: Former head coach Scott Rogers has said it is "criminal" that England men's amputee football team could miss the 2026 World Cup due to a lack of funding.
summary.zh-CN: 前主教练斯科特·罗杰斯（ Scott Rogers ）表示，由于缺乏资金，英格兰男子截肢足球队可能错过2026年世界杯是“犯罪”。

title.en: Scotland's Gunn concedes four in San Jose debut defeat
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰的冈恩在圣何塞首次亮相失利时承认了四场比赛
